tasks.subject: Task 1: nextjs-scaffold — convert 6 [generate] annotations to [verbatim — Part C] and append verbatim blocks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace 6 `[generate]` annotations in `skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md` with `[verbatim — Part C]` and append the corresponding verbatim file blocks to Part C.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 6 tree annotations changed from `[generate — ...]` to `[verbatim — Part C]` (or with "update branding in Step 2")
- [ ] 6 verbatim blocks appended to Part C (before `---\n\n## Scaffold Steps`)
- [ ] grep for `[generate` in nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md returns 0 matches
- [ ] All 6 verbatim headings are present in file

**Verify:** `grep -c '\[generate' skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md` → 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c '[generate' skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["0 [generate] annotations remain", "6 verbatim blocks appended to Part C"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: nestjs-add-database — append Completing Auth Integration section (Drizzle + Kysely + Mongoose)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append "Completing Auth Integration" section to `skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md` covering Drizzle, Kysely, and Mongoose paths (3 steps each).

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Section heading "## Completing Auth Integration" present
- [ ] Drizzle path: schema update, AuthService replacement, AuthModule note
- [ ] Kysely path: types/migration, AuthService replacement, AuthModule note
- [ ] Mongoose path: User model, AuthService replacement, AuthModule update
- [ ] All 3 paths return `{ accessToken, tokenType: 'bearer' as const }`
- [ ] grep for stub error text returns 0 matches

**Verify:** `grep -c 'tokenType' skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md` → 3

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c 'tokenType' skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["## Completing Auth Integration heading present", "3 tokenType occurrences (one per DB path)", "0 stub error messages"]}
```
